title: Can Indians earn from idle gold through stablecoins? Why CoinSwitch co-founder sees challenges in Nikhil Kamath’s idea
summary: Nikhil Kamath proposed a gold-backed stablecoin to monetize idle gold in Indian households. CoinSwitch's Ashish Singhal noted existing global products but highlighted challenges with India's gold, including regulation, trust, and storage of non-standardized gold assets.

title: EPFO deadline alert: File April 2026 ECR, deposit PF dues by 15 May to avoid penalties
summary: The EPFO ECR filing deadline reminder urges employers to submit the April 2026 returns and deposit provident fund contributions by 15 May to avoid penalties, interest charges and compliance issues.&nbsp;

title: Should you add silver instead of gold after the duty hike-triggered price rally? Experts say, ‘a tactical addition…’
summary: India has increased import tariffs on gold and silver to 15%, up from 6%, to reduce imports and protect foreign exchange reserves. This tariff increase led to a nearly 6% price surge in both metals, impacting demand for gold jewellery and prompting investors to consider silver as an alternative.

title: Income isn’t wealth: The silent trap of high-flying executives
summary: High income, high lifestyle, zero strategy. Why even top executives with stellar careers often fail at wealth creation — and how misplaced confidence and poor execution derail financial futures.

title: Mirae Asset launches SIF-based Platinum Hybrid Long-Short Fund – key details explained
summary: Mirae Asset Mutual Fund has launched the Platinum Hybrid Long-Short Fund under the SIF category, offering conservative investors risk-adjusted returns through hedged equity, arbitrage and debt exposure in the country.

title: Gold and silver price today, May 14: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold and 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai, other cities
summary: Gold and silver prices fell in India on 14 May amid key global developments. MCX gold futures slipped 0.37% to ₹1,62,270 per 10 gm, while silver futures dropped 1.61% to ₹2,96,160 per kg. Markets remained focused on the Trump-Xi summit, the new US Fed chair, and oil market volatility.

title: Bengal DA hike soon: Can Suvendu Adhikari's cabinet bridge the Centre-state gap? – Here's what to expect
summary: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced that the cabinet will discuss Dearness Allowance and the Seventh Pay Commission on May 18. A recent 4% DA increase brings it to 22%, but state employees still lag behind central staff due to differing pay commissions.

title: Warren Buffett flags three dangerous trends for investors in 2026: ‘That’s not investing’
summary: Warren Buffett cautioned against the growing trend of gambling in investing as markets reach record highs, citing excessive greed driving asset prices. He pointed to the rise of one-day options trading and prediction markets as alarming developments that misprice securities.

title: DA hike in Bihar: Samrat Choudhary govt announces DA, DR hike for employees, pensioners— Check new rates, effective date
summary: The Bihar government has approved a Dearness Allowance increase for state employees and pensioners, raising it by 5 percentage points for the 6th Central Pay Commission and by 9 points for the 5th, effective January 1, 2026. This is a key financial decision by Chief Minister Samrat Choudhary.

title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit: Market titans decode AI, wealth creation & India’s next investment cycle
